creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
The whole system freezes and becomes unresponsive when I start a virtual machine. The exact moment it hangs is after you close the window asking you to select the installation media. If you already selected an installation media in the virtual machine's settings then the host machine hangs almost immediately after starting the guest machine.

-------------------------------------

FreeBSD version: FreeBSD 12.0-ALPHA6  r338797  amd64

packages: virtualbox-ose-5.2.18_1
          virtualbox-ose-kmod-5.2.18
          nvidia-driver-390.77_2

loader.conf: vboxdrv_load="YES"

rc.conf: kld_list="acpi_video nvidia-modeset"
         linux_enable="YES", 
         vboxnet_enable="YES"

filesystem: ZFS

Nvidia card: GF119 [NVS 315]
